title: Does Asuka control her DSS Choker
display_title: Does Asuka control her DSS Choker
wikitext:
[]: Does Asuka control her DSS Choker?             Quote Post by Konja7 » Tue Aug 24, 2021 5:55 pm I don't exactly understand how the DSS Choker works. When Asuka uses the 9th Angel power, her DSS Choker start to shine. However, the bomb in the DSS Choker doesn't activate. In fact, it seems Asuka controls the explosion of the DSS Choker. At least, she needs to rip the collar of her plugsuit for the DSS Choker bomb to be activated.

[]: Re: Does Asuka control her DSS Choker?             Quote Post by Archer » Tue Aug 24, 2021 8:21 pm I can totally buy the fact that her bomb collar is a self-imposed suicide pill. Perhaps it’s designed to go off automatically (…after a while) if she ever has to engage “Angel mode”, and the only reason she survived is Unit-13 absorbing her.

[]: Re: Does Asuka control her DSS Choker?             Quote Post by Konja7 » Tue Aug 24, 2021 8:57 pm Archer wrote: I can totally buy the fact that her bomb collar is a self-imposed suicide pill. Perhaps it’s designed to go off automatically (…after a while) if she ever has to engage “Angel mode”, and the only reason she survived is Unit-13 absorbing her.

[]: Re: Does Asuka control her DSS Choker?             Quote Post by Derantor » Mon Aug 30, 2021 2:13 pm Same thing as Kaworu. If you're an Angel, you can choose your time of death. Or it was on a timer that just happened to be the exact length of the scene.

[]: Re: Does Asuka control her DSS Choker?             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Aug 30, 2021 2:36 pm I assume it was on a timer, and her pulling open her collar was just a flex of sorts, "see that? Guess what, you can't do jack to me, I'm gonna have my head blown off in just a second. Fuck you, you have nothing that scares me" How much of that is actually true and how much of that is just her putting on a brave face to the world and herself is up for debate, of course

[]: Re: Does Asuka control her DSS Choker?             Quote Post by Konja7 » Mon Aug 30, 2021 3:00 pm Derantor wrote: Same thing as Kaworu. If you're an Angel, you can choose your time of death. Or it was on a timer that just happened to be the exact length of the scene.
